quote: The attention to detail and strategic approach to stakeholder engagement and communications was effective and highly valued.
author: Amanda Lewry

quote: I have highly valued the insight, strategic guidance and connections provided, which has transformed our Defence sector business.
author: Justin McNicol

quote: Matt Neagle is a highly accomplished public affairs operative and a valued partner. He is a strategic thinker, always considering the wider context and future implications, with very sound political judgement and insight. Matt is commercially minded, and his counsel is grounded in the realities of the businesses and organisations he works with.
author: Andrew Butler

quote: The Advocacy, Communication and Engagement plan has helped Council to prioritise and be effective with our lobbying and planning — they really delivered.
author: Sean Holden
